# Verify Comment-Section Narrative Capture

## Claim being tested

Comment consensus reflects independent audience reaction.

## Alternative hypothesis

A coordinated group seeded comments to frame the interpretation.

## Data fields

- comment_id
- account_id
- timestamp
- parent post
- text
- likes/replies
- account history
- repeated phrases
- pinned/reposted comments

## Metrics

- first-comment framing effect
- repeated phrase frequency
- comment timing burst
- account overlap across posts
- semantic clustering
- like velocity on seeded comments

## Graph model

Account-comment-theme network. Link accounts that repeatedly post similar comment frames across posts.

## Safe conclusion

"Comment patterns show narrative-seeding risk where early, repeated, similar comments frame interpretation before organic discussion develops."
